title: About Me
text:
I’m a dual-degree business student wrapping up five years split between Brock University in St. Catharines, Ontario, Canada and Dublin City University in Dublin, Ireland. The degree is unusual by design. I completed three years in Canada and two years in Ireland, with internships in each. It has shaped how I think about problems, people, and places more than any single course has.
My academic focus sits at the intersection of business and data: how you collect it, make sense of it, and turn it into decisions that actually matter. Outside the classroom, I’m a photographer and traveller who believes the best way to understand something is to go and see it yourself.1

title: About Me
text:
Interests
Beyond the academic work, a few things keep me grounded:

📷 Photography — I shoot wherever I travel, mostly landscapes and street. You can see some of it on the Photography page.
🍳 Cooking — feeding people is one of my favourite things to do.
✈️ Travel — the dual-degree provided me with numerous opportunities for spontaneous travel, fuelling my passion.








TipCurrently Open To



Graduate roles and opportunities in data analytics, business intelligence, or operations — particularly where analytical thinking meets real business impact.

title: About Me
text:
Footnotes


The photography page on this site is a small record of that: a collection of
my favourite photos from my travels.↩︎

title: Dennis Chumakov
text:
I’m a dual-degree business student finishing up at Dublin City University and Brock University, with a focus on data analytics, workflow automation, and applied problem-solving.
From machine learning models to building a startup from the ground up — this portfolio captures the work and experiences that have defined my time in college.
When I’m not buried in data, I’m usually behind a camera somewhere new.



🎓 Education
Dual degree across Ireland and Canada, combining Global Business with Business Administration.


📊 Skills
Python · Quarto · Git · Data Analysis · Machine Learning · SCSS


📷 Beyond the Desk
Traveller and photographer — always looking for the next shot.

title: Projects
text: Below are selected academic projects that demonstrate my skills in data analysis, research, and business problem-solving.

title: Projects
text:
Data Analysis Dashboard



Dashboard Example


Tools used: Excel, Power BI
This project involved analysing a dataset and creating an interactive dashboard to identify key trends and communicate insights clearly to non-technical audiences.
Key elements of the project included:

Data cleaning and preparation

Building interactive visualisations

Identifying patterns and insights in the data

Presenting findings through a clear dashboard design

title: Projects
text:
Business Strategy Analysis



Strategy Project


Tools used: Research, strategic frameworks
This project focused on analysing a company’s competitive strategy and market positioning using common business strategy frameworks.
Key elements included:

Industry and market analysis

Strategic framework application

Business recommendations
